\thispagestyle{empty}

<!-- ![](img/SHINE_logo.jpg){fig-align=left} -->
# SHINE PUPIL MENTAL HEALTH SURVEY RESULTS
/
# `{r} school_name`
/
# `{r} term`

![](../img/iStock-1062826670.jpg){fig-align="center"}


![](../img/uosa.png){fig-align="center" height=50}

![](../img/mrc.png){fig-align="center" height=50}

![](../img/hbsc.png){fig-align="center" height=80}


[**Web:** gla.ac.uk/shine **\| Tel:** (+44) 141 330 4042]{.col .s12
.center style="font-size:10pt"}
